bookmarks.title: Badgeify — Add App Icons & Notifications to Your Mac Menu Bar
bookmarks.excerpt: Get instant notifications from Messages, Mail, Slack, and more directly in your menu bar. Perfect for Mac users who hide their Dock or want better notification management.

bookmarks.excerpt: A whole new way, full of possibilities of using your macos notch

bookmarks.title: stagewise
bookmarks.excerpt: The coding agent built for the web. stagewise is a purpose-built browser for developers with a coding agent built right in.

bookmarks.title: Fork - a fast and friendly git client for Mac and Windows
bookmarks.excerpt: Fork - a fast and friendly git client for Mac and Windows.

bookmarks.title: Paseo – Run Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode from everywhere
bookmarks.excerpt: A self-hosted daemon for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode. Agents run on your machine with your full dev environment. Connect from phone, desktop, or web.

bookmarks.title: Widgets | Apple Developer Documentation
bookmarks.excerpt: A widget provides quick access to essential information and focused interactions from your app or game in additional contexts.
